notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-19, resolving a real source conflict: Oman Ministry of Labour's own official X account (@Labour_OMAN) confirms 12:30-15:30, June-August — used this over conflicting secondary-source figures (11:00-16:00) with no official backing.

Multiple Omani outlets (tamol.om, ol.om, alsahwa.om) published Ministry corrections debunking premature social-media rumors about the ban 'not having started yet' — confirms genuine recurring public confusion each season, a real content gap this page fills.
Scope: construction sites and open/uncovered locations, per the Ministry's own wording.
Ban period is 3 months only (June 1 - Aug 31) — shorter than Qatar/UAE which extend to September 15.
Single-country event (_countryCode: om), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
core.type is 'fixed' anchored to June 1 (start date); August 31 end date covered in FAQ/aboutEvent/schemaData.endDate.
